info.title: Billing & Solar ERP API
info.description: Billing + Cloud Solar Panel Installation & Service Management API. Workflow: Lead → Survey → Quotation → Installation → Service & AMC. Roles: MD Super Admin, Branch Manager, Branch Admin, Sales Executive, Site Survey Engineer, Installation Manager/Technician, Service Team, Accounts. JWT Secured: use POST /api/v1/auth/login then header Authorization: Bearer {access_token}. AI-friendly: structured JSON responses, clear field names, dashboard metrics.

get.description: List AMC contracts.

post.description: Create AMC contract (after installation).

get.description: Get AMC contract.

post.description: Authenticate with username or email and password. Returns JWT token. Use for all logins: organization users (admin, subadmin, manager, user, viewer) and Super Admin (same endpoint; use Super Admin credentials to get a token with role super_admin). ⚠️ Copy ONLY the `access_token` from the response for Authorization: Bearer {access_token}. Do NOT use JWT_SECRET from .env.

access_token.description: JWT token - use in Authorization: Bearer header

post.description: Create a new organization and admin user. Returns JWT token.
Invalidate the current JWT token. Requires Bearer token.
Get a new access token using current valid token.

Debug endpoint: Check if your token has the correct format. Send: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN_HERE. If you accidentally send JWT_SECRET from .env, this endpoint will tell you and explain how to fix it.

get.description:
Get the authenticated user's profile. Requires Bearer token obtained from POST /api/v1/auth/login. ⚠️ Use ONLY the `access_token` returned by the login response as the Bearer token (e.g. Authorization: Bearer {access_token}). Do NOT use the JWT_SECRET from .env.

Example curl:

curl --location 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/me' \
  --header 'accept: application/json' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer {access_token}'
Returns the authenticated user's permissions and enabled menu modules. Use this to show/hide menus based on role. Super admin gets all permissions.

menus.description: Unique module names the user can access (for showing enabled menus)

get.description: Total sales, paid, unpaid, cancelled for organization by period (today, week, month, year).

post.description: Create a new bill/invoice. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get paginated list of customers. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Create a new customer. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get customer summary statistics. Requires Bearer token.
Get customer basic details. Requires Bearer token.

put.description: Update customer details. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a customer. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get invoices for a customer (transaction timeline). Requires Bearer token.
Get net profit for period (T=Today, W=Week, M=Month, Y=Year). Requires Bearer token.
Get total received (payments) for period. Requires Bearer token.
Get income (invoice totals) and expenses for period. Requires Bearer token.
Get items where stock is at or below low stock alert. Requires Bearer token.
Get payment totals grouped by payment method for chart. Requires Bearer token.
Get URLs for New Bill, Add Product, Add Customer. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Move DC to Invoice (convert).

get.description: Total Sales, Paid, Unpaid, Cancelled for period. Requires Bearer token.
Invoice history with pagination. Requires Bearer token.
Invoice detail with line items and payments. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a draft invoice. Requires Bearer token.

patch.description: Mark invoice as cancelled. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: CRM lead list. Pipeline: new → contacted → site_survey → proposal → negotiation → confirmed → installation → closed_lost

post.description: Create lead. Branch Admin / Receptionist / Sales.

get.description: Get single lead.
List all organizations (Super Admin only).

post.description: Create organization (Super Admin only).

get.description: Show organization (Super Admin only).
List all permissions. Use for role-based access: assign permission_ids to roles; users get menus based on their role's permissions (see GET /auth/permissions).

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Filter by module (e.g. invoices, customers, users)

parameters.name: grouped
parameters.description: If true, return permissions grouped by module

get.description: Get paginated list of products/items. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Create a new product/item. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get stock value and low stock count. Requires Bearer token.
Get product/item details. Requires Bearer token.

put.description: Update product details including price and stock. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a product/item. Requires Bearer token.

patch.description: Quick update of stock quantity. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Move Quotation to Invoice (convert).

get.description: List all roles with user count and permission count. Super Admin only.

post.description: Create a new role (Super Admin only). Assign permissions via permission_ids.

get.description: Get a single role with its permissions (Super Admin only).

put.description: Update a role and/or its permissions (Super Admin only). System roles have restricted edits.

delete.description: Delete a role (Super Admin only). Fails if role is system or has users assigned.

get.description: List service tickets.

post.description: Create service ticket (Customer complaint / AMC).

get.description: Get service ticket.
Total leads, installations, revenue branch-wise, pending installations, technician productivity, AMC renewals, sales conversion. AI-friendly summary.
List installations (Installation Manager / Branch Manager).

post.description: Create installation (after quotation approved).

get.description: Get installation with checklist and technicians.

post.description: Assign technicians to installation.

get.description: Super Admin Dashboard - SaaS-wide stats.

post.description: Super admin obtains a JWT token for the target user (by user ID) to access their organization. Use the returned access_token as Bearer for subsequent requests as that user.

get.description: List surveys (by lead or branch).

List users. Super Admin: all org users. Org Admin: users in their org only.

get.description: Show user.
List vendors (branch or all for MD Super Admin).

post.description: Create vendor (MD Super Admin / Branch).

get.description: Get vendor.

bearerAuth.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: \"Authorization: Bearer {token}\"
bearerAuth.name: Authorization
